title: ipomopsis spicata subsp. robruthiae
intro: Ipomopsis spicata subsp. robruthiae, also known as Sky Pilot, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. This plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Sky Pilot include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infused in oil, or used in salves to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
